WatabouOPD.DropSvg: Drop a Watabou SVG here or choose a file
WatabouOPD.HelpIntro: Before importing a Watabou SVG, check these settings and limitations.
WatabouOPD.HelpNoRotation: Do not import maps where the dungeon is angled or rotated. Foundry square grids cannot be aligned to arbitrarily rotated Watabou maps.
WatabouOPD.HelpDisableNotes: In Watabou, disable Notes before exporting SVG. Notes can add extra labels and layout elements that are not useful for scene import.
WatabouOPD.HelpWatabouArtifacts: Watabou can export SVG files with visual artifacts such as stray black lines. Those artifacts come from Watabou itself and are not module bugs.
WatabouOPD.ImportComplete: Created scene "{name}" with {walls} walls and {doors} doors.
WatabouOPD.InvalidSvg: The selected file is not a valid SVG.
WatabouOPD.MissingFloor: Could not find the Watabou floor mask layer in this SVG.
WatabouOPD.MissingDoors: No Watabou door shapes were found. The scene will still be imported.
WatabouOPD.UnsupportedRotatedMap: This Watabou SVG uses an angled dungeon layout. Foundry square grids cannot be aligned to arbitrarily rotated maps, so this file cannot be imported.
